purpose: A multi-select dropdown with type-ahead filter. User can select multiple items from a list; selected items appear as tokens above the input. Suited for 10+ options where search helps.
whenToUse: Multiple selections from a fixed list of 10+ options
When users may add/remove items frequently
doRules: Show selected items as removable tokens
Indicate when no matches via empty state
dontRules: Do not allow duplicates if uniqueness matters
Do not display fewer than 4 options in the dropdown

responsiveBehavior.M: Tokens may compress to overflow indicator

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Type-ahead filters; arrows traverse suggestions; Enter selects; Backspace removes last token
Number of selected items announced when count changes

exceptions: Use showSelectAll for select-all action; some implementations omit
